messages.content: # Is your Car's throttle not working, but all other controls are? Follow This Guide!

# Warning:
> ### This guide will only work, if the throttle, and only the throttle is not responding.
> 
> If your controls in general are not working, please follow: 
> * https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322253669751591043
> * https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322255308776538243
> * https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1322254966953476218

# No Hesi Car's:
> ### If the car you are trying to use is a No Hesi Car, please follow the following:
## Step 1:
> Reinstall the specific car having this issue **manually**: https://discord.com/channels/964645662866173972/1440122305861652520

## Step 2:
> If the above did **not** work, ensure your **antivirus **/ **firewall **/ **ISP** are not blocking the connection, resulting in our car's encryption failing.
> 
> 1. **Antiviruses** -> Disable these or allow exceptions for Assetto Corsa and Content Manager
> 2. **Firewalls **-> Allow exceptions for Assetto Corsa and Content Manager [(click here for tutorial)](<https://www.belkin.com/au/support-article/?articleNum=8071>)
> 3. **ISPs** -> If this applies to you, most common for **Russian Users**, you will be required to use a **VPN** or **Proxy **to bypass this.

# Custom Car's In Custom Servers:
> ### If the car you are trying to use, is a Custom Car within a Custom Server, please follow the following:
## Step 1:
> The car you are trying to use is encrypted to only work in certain allowed online servers. This may exclude No Hesi resulting in this issue.
> 
> This is common for most paid cars and other cut up Assetto Corsa server cars.
> 
> You will **not** be able to fix this, and you will not be able to drive that car on our custom servers.
